input.command:
# Test if the Alchemy key works from server side (it's domain-restricted for browser)
curl -s -X POST "https://base-mainnet.g.alchemy.com/v2/oTgEqagb1skfZMORBdRso" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "Origin: https://vie.dev" \
  -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"eth_blockNumber","params":[]}' 2>/dev/null | head -50
input.description: Test Alchemy key with vie.dev origin

metadata.description: Test Alchemy key with vie.dev origin
